vocab.example: Please follow the style guide when formatting your code.
vocab.example_vi: Vui lòng theo quy chuẩn viết code khi định dạng.

vocab.example: This is just a nitpick, not a blocking issue.
vocab.example_vi: Đây chỉ là góp ý nhỏ nhặt, không phải vấn đề chặn merge.

vocab.meaning_vi: thay đổi gây ảnh hưởng ngược
vocab.example: This is a breaking change — other services need updating too.
vocab.example_vi: Đây là thay đổi gây ảnh hưởng ngược — các dịch vụ khác cũng cần cập nhật.

vocab.example: Did you add a unit test for this new function?
vocab.example_vi: Bạn đã thêm unit test cho hàm mới này chưa?

vocab.example: Please keep the error messages consistent across the app.
vocab.example_vi: Vui lòng giữ thông báo lỗi nhất quán trong toàn ứng dụng.

vocab.example: We had to revert the last commit because it broke the build.
vocab.example_vi: Chúng tôi phải hoàn tác commit cuối vì nó làm hỏng bản build.

vocab.example: I'll approve with comments — please fix them before merging.
vocab.example_vi: Tôi sẽ phê duyệt kèm góp ý — hãy sửa trước khi merge.

vocab.example: Try to give constructive feedback, not just criticism.
vocab.example_vi: Hãy góp ý mang tính xây dựng, đừng chỉ chỉ trích.

lines.speaker: Hoa
lines.text: Minh, I reviewed your pull request. Overall it looks solid.

lines.speaker: Minh
lines.text: Thanks! Any issues I should fix?

lines.speaker: Hoa
lines.text: Just a nitpick — please follow the style guide for spacing.

lines.speaker: Minh
lines.text: No problem, easy fix. Anything more serious?

lines.speaker: Hoa
lines.text: Yes, this looks like a breaking change. Other services might be affected.

lines.speaker: Minh
lines.text: Good catch, I didn't think about that. I'll add a unit test to be safe.

lines.speaker: Hoa
lines.text: Great. Also, keep the error messages consistent with the rest of the app.

lines.speaker: Minh
lines.text: Got it. I'll update everything today.

lines.speaker: Hoa
lines.text: I'll approve with comments for now. Thanks for being open to constructive feedback.

lines.speaker: Minh
lines.text: Of course, this review really helped me improve the code.

questions.q: What serious issue does Hoa point out?
options: A breaking change affecting other services

questions.q: How does Hoa approve the pull request?

shadowing: Overall it looks solid, just a small nitpick about spacing.
This looks like a breaking change for other services in production.
I'll add a unit test to be safe before merging this.
Keep the error messages consistent with the rest of the app.
Thanks for being open to constructive feedback during the review.
